text:
Shadow Jacker is a elderly dragon who appears in the episode "Claw and Hoarder: Special Ricktim's Morty".

Shadow Jacker is first seen when Rick, Morty, Summer and Balthromaw encounter him with other slut dragons. He joins them to perform asoul-bond ritual to kill The Wizard at his lair. After Shadow Jacker, the Smiths and the dragons kill the Wizard with their attack, Rick and Balthromaw are not soul-bonded anymore Morty and the other dragons and the dragons earn their freedom.
